# Coding Hermes Analytics Dashboard

Static dashboard for Coding Hermes multi-model coding pipeline metrics.

**Data source:** `summary.json` — generated by the coding-hermes analytics plugin (DuckDB → JSON aggregator).

**Sections:**
- Project health grid (13 projects, pass rates, cost, velocity)
- Runs per day (stacked bar)
- Model distribution (donut)
- Token burn rate (line chart)
- Commit velocity (stacked bar)
- Lines changed (area chart)
- Cost tracker (per-model pricing table)
- File hotspots (top 20 most-changed files)

**Deploy:** GitHub Pages from `main` branch, root directory.

**Stack:** Vanilla HTML + Chart.js (CDN), zero dependencies, zero build step.
